svg.title: Healthcare Ecosystem Diagram
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the major actors in the healthcare ecosystem — patients, providers, payers, PBMs, government, HIT vendors — and the data flows between them including clinical data, claims, and pharmacy flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data does a patient generate in the healthcare ecosystem?')
sendPrompt('What EHR data does a hospital generate?')
sendPrompt('What data does a physician practice generate?')
sendPrompt('What data does a pharmacy generate?')
sendPrompt('What data does a commercial insurer generate?')
sendPrompt('What is Medicare Advantage and what data does it generate?')
sendPrompt('What does a PBM do and what data does it generate?')
sendPrompt('What is an EHR vendor and what does it do?')
sendPrompt('What is a Health Information Exchange?')
sendPrompt('What is a claims data warehouse or real-world data vendor?')
sendPrompt('What does a population health analytics platform do?')
sendPrompt('What is a CDW or clinical data warehouse?')
sendPrompt('What role does CMS play in healthcare data?')
sendPrompt('What is the FDA role in healthcare data?')
sendPrompt('What is NCQA and how does it use healthcare data?')
sendPrompt('How does the CDC use healthcare data?')
